hero.name: Rendy Wijaya Pranata
hero.role: Web Developer | SMKN 1 Ciomas XI PPLG 1
hero.descriptionHtml:
I am also learning and developing my skills in Full Stack Web Development using React.js for frontend and Node.js + Express for backend, as well as MongoDB for the database.

Additionally, I am familiar with tools like VS Code and Laragon for local development, as well as frameworks like Bootstrap and Tailwind CSS for building modern, responsive, and efficient interfaces.

about.aboutParagraphHtml: I am Rendy Wijaya Pranata, a student from SMKN 1 Ciomas majoring in XI PPLG 1. I focus on Web Development and am currently deepening my knowledge in HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and Laravel.
about.whatIdoParagraphHtml:
Frontend Development — Building modern, responsive, and interactive UI.

Backend Development — Building API systems, databases, and application logic.

Fullstack App — Working on projects from frontend to backend end-to-end.

projects.title: Luxora Olshop
projects.stack: PHP Native, MySQL, HTML, CSS, JavaScript
projects.desc: Simple E-Commerce based on PHP Native with product management system, shopping cart, checkout, product image upload, as well as order and transaction system.
